document_name: Bonn Regional Sleep Disorder Prevalence Data
description: Current statistics on NREM parasomnia incidence and demographic distribution in Bonn and surrounding areas.
steps_to_find: Contact Bonn Municipal Health Department
Access regional health authority databases
Review publications from University Hospital Bonn sleep clinic
Consult WHO Global Sleep Health Reports
access_difficulty: Medium - Requires official data request and health privacy compliance

document_name: Existing Building Safety Regulations in Bonn
description: Local codes governing residential facilities, including fire safety, emergency exits, and medical equipment installation.
steps_to_find: Contact Bonn City Planning Department
Review Bonn Building Code (Bauordnung)
Consult local fire department guidelines
Access municipal website for safety certifications
access_difficulty: Medium - Requires official building permit application process

document_name: GDPR Compliance Guidelines for Medical Research
description: Regulatory requirements for handling health data, including consent protocols and data encryption standards.
steps_to_find: Access European Data Protection Board (EDPB) guidelines
Review German Federal Data Protection Act (BDSG) updates
Consult local Data Protection Authority (DSK) resources
Examine templates from Max Planck Society data management policies

description: Technical standards and performance metrics for PSG systems used in parasomnia research.
steps_to_find: Access AASM equipment certification lists
Review manufacturer technical manuals (e.g., Grass, Nihon Kohden)
Consult sleep technology trade journals
Examine peer-reviewed studies on PSG accuracy
access_difficulty: Medium - Requires access to technical publications and manufacturer databases

description: Contact information and practice details for neurologists specializing in sleep disorders in Bonn and surrounding areas.
steps_to_find: Access German Medical Association (Bundesärztekammer) directory
Consult local medical practice listings
Review publications from Deutsche Gesellschaft für Schlafforschung und Schlafmedizin
Contact University Hospital Bonn's neurology department
access_difficulty: Medium - Requires professional network access and medical licensing verification

description: Official criteria for identifying parasomnia events and scoring sleep stages.
steps_to_find: Purchase AASM Manual of Sleep Medicine
Access AASM website for updated guidelines
Review recent publications in Sleep Medicine journal
Consult sleep technology vendor training materials
access_difficulty: Medium - Requires institutional access to medical journals and professional memberships
